title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF LAMO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY LAMO, MUNICIPALITY OF DUPAX DEL NORTE, PROVINCE OF NUEVA VIZCAYA TO DUPAX DEL NORTE NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 1235; 106 OG No. 6, 756 (February 8, 2010)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9779, November 18, 2009 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF LAMO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY LAMO, MUNICIPALITY OF DUPAX DEL NORTE, PROVINCE OF NUEVA VIZCAYA TO DUPAX DEL NORTE NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Renaming of a National High School.

â The name of Lamo National High School in Barangay Lamo, Municipality of Dupax del Norte, Province of Nueva Vizcaya is hereby changed to Dupax del Norte National High School.

SEC. 2.

Location of the Main Campus.

â The main campus of the Dupax del Norte National High School shall continue to remain in its present location in Barangay Lamo, Municipality of Dupax del Norte, Province of Nueva Vizcaya.

SEC. 3.

Effectivity.

â This Act shall take effect fifteen 915) days after its publication in the Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

(Sgd.) PROSPERO C. NOGRALES

President of Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 28, 2008 and August 17, 2009, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary of Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: NOV 18 2009

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
